response_text:
ENTITY Client
PK client_id
ATTR client_id : integer : PK
ATTR client_name : varchar

ENTITY Order
PK order_id
ATTR order_id : integer : PK
ATTR client_id : integer : FK
ATTR order_date : date

ENTITY Material
PK material_id
ATTR material_id : integer : PK
ATTR material_name : varchar

ENTITY WorkCenter
PK workcenter_id
ATTR workcenter_id : integer : PK
ATTR workcenter_name : varchar

ENTITY Operation
PK operation_id
ATTR operation_id : integer : PK
ATTR operation_name : varchar

ENTITY ProductionStep
PK production_step_id
ATTR production_step_id : integer : PK
ATTR order_id : integer : FK
ATTR material_id : integer : FK
ATTR operation_id : integer : FK
ATTR step_sequence : integer
ATTR start_time : timestamp
ATTR quantity : float

REL Order -> Client : 1..N -> 1 : FK=client_id
REL ProductionStep -> Order : 1..N -> 1 : FK=order_id
REL ProductionStep -> Material : 1 -> 1..N : FK=material_id
REL ProductionStep -> Operation : 1 -> 1..N : FK=operation_id
